comment: SmartThings-style mock appliance state. Scheduled actions use ISO local date-time strings
supplied by proposals; the appliance inventory itself is date-free.
v3.4: each appliance carries an `energy` block. Appliance.ListAppliances returns this
array VERBATIM, so the planner sees the real draw without a new plugin or tool — that is
what lets the energy_saving goal reason about shifting a heavy run to an eco program in an
off-peak window (see energy.json for the baseline, target and tariff windows).
kwh_per_run is a typical cycle; eco_kwh_per_run is the same cycle on its eco program.
